title: Grid lines in "New Board" experience to be optional
excerpt: Please have the option for users to turn off the grid in the “new board” experience. In our case, it is very distracting and super messy visually with all those lines. It makes the experience rather unpleasant and irrita…

posts.author: carm-ai (Carmen Yuen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please have the option for users to turn off the grid in the “new board” experience. In our case, it is very distracting and super messy visually with all those lines. It makes the experience rather unpleasant and irritating on the eyes.
If there is an option for this it opens up customizability based on users needs and how they work in their workspace. Aura and comfort in your own space also applies to these situations. lol
Thank you
